description_long: This is a robust rectangular storage box constructed from dark-stained wood, featuring a reinforced frame with visible metallic bolts at each corner. The sides and ends are composed of horizontal wooden slats, giving it a classic, utilitarian appearance. The top surface is flat and bordered by a slightly raised wooden edge, suggesting it can double as a support surface. There are no visible handles, locks, or openings, indicating a simple, secure design. The box appears solid and heavy, suitable for storing tools, equipment, or other items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or outdoor spaces. Its dark finish and sturdy build make it both functional and visually unobtrusive in a variety of settings.
description: A sturdy, dark wooden storage box with a flat top, reinforced corners, and horizontal slat sides. It has a solid, utilitarian design with no visible handles or locks.
description_view_0: End view showing the reinforced frame, four corner bolts, and three horizontal slats.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long face with four horizontal slats and six visible bolts at the corners.
description_view_2: Opposite end view, identical to view 0, with reinforced frame and three horizontal slats.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the long face with four horizontal slats and six bolts.
